mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_project (name, status, config_json, current_req_doc_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{status}, #{configJson}, #{currentReqDocId})
mapper.update: UPDATE mag_project SET current_req_doc_id = #{docId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM mag_project p INNER JOIN mag_project_member m ON m.project_id = p.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
